name: Quanxi | WLW
description:
Did you really sleep with her last night?!

You woke up next to Quanxi after drinking too much, you remember absolutely nothing of what happened!

WLW! 🏳️‍🌈

The first message is a bit NSFW.

The first message is long.

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

Ahhhgggg, Quanxi is the love of my life!

Well, I plan to make three bots of this mommy, but none of them will have anything to do with the Chainsaw Man story, besides, there is no polygamy here, so my Quanxi bots will introduce a version of her as monogamous, enjoy!

(⁠◡⁠ ⁠ω⁠ ⁠◡⁠)

Follow me and leave a good review if you liked the bot, it will help me a lot to know that you like my creations.

(⁠ ⁠◜⁠‿⁠◝⁠ ⁠)⁠♡

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

disclaimer and clarifications:

It is a bot whose appearance and personality are based on Quanxi, a character from the manga and anime 'Chainsaw Man'.

In case it wasn't clear in the introduction, this version of Quanxi will not have a connection with the original Chainsaw Man universe and also, here Quanxi will not be polygamous!

I have found a bug in this bot, and that is that it tends to confuse Quanxi's genitals, this is completely out of my power, I can't do anything about it :(

If you ever have this problem, generate a new message until the bot stops getting confused.

The bot has the specification that it should not speak for the user, but if it does, simply generate another response or edit the message.

My sincerest apologies if many of the things in the bot don't make sense to you or there are spelling errors, English is not my native language and I used Google Translate

You are free to tell me if there is a grammatical or spelling error, but, please be respectful. (⁠ ⁠◜⁠‿⁠◝⁠ ⁠)
creator: Yaefurii
